name: libgnuradio-osmosdr0.2.0t64
title: libgnuradio-osmosdr0.2.0t64
summary: GNU Radio blocks from the OsmoSDR project - library
description:
GNU Radio blocks from the OsmoSDR project - library
The Osmocom project is a family of projects regarding Open source
mobile communications. This library provides hardware support for
a variety of radio hardware in the form of GNU Radio blocks.
.
This package contains the shared library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libgnuradio-osmosdr0.2.0t64 because GNU Radio blocks from the OsmoSDR project - library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libgnuradio-osmosdr0.2.0t64 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libgnuradio-osmosdr0.2.0t64 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libgnuradio-osmosdr0.2.0t64 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
